hero.title: Bridging the Gap in Continuous Care
hero.description: I-CAMS connects patients, nurses, and doctors in a unified platform for reliable, innovative, and accessible healthcare management. Real-time monitoring, seamless communication, and proactive care for chronic conditions.

overview.heading: What is I-CAMS?
overview.content: The Integrated Care Assessment and Monitoring System (I-CAMS) is a comprehensive digital health platform designed to revolutionize how patients, nurses, and doctors collaborate in delivering continuous care. By connecting all stakeholders in a unified ecosystem, I-CAMS enables real-time health monitoring, seamless communication, and data-driven clinical decision-making. Our mission is to bridge the gap in continuous care by providing reliable, innovative, and accessible tools that empower patients to take control of their health while enabling healthcare professionals to deliver more effective, coordinated care for chronic conditions.

features.heading: A better way to manage health
features.description: I-CAMS provides comprehensive tools for healthcare management

footer.clinicalTagline: Bridging the clinical gap through technology, one log at a time.

about.title: Precision Care, Integrated.
about.description: Bridging the clinical gap through advanced digital monitoring and compassionate technology.
about.challengeContent1: The current healthcare landscape in Sri Lanka remains heavily reliant on manual documentation and sporadic follow-ups. This creates a significant 'Technology Gap' between hospital care and patient experiences at home.
about.challengeContent2: Manual systems lead to delayed interventions, fragmented communication, and lack of standardized health data. For chronic condition management, this represents a critical barrier to optimal health outcomes.
about.solutionContent1: I-CAMS bridges this gap through an integrated digital framework that simplifies healthcare monitoring into a seamless, role-based ecosystem.
about.solutionContent2: By centralizing real-time health logs, diagnostic trends, and secure communication, we empower all stakeholders with actionable data for precise, data-driven decision-making.

features_page.title: Clinical Capabilities
features_page.description: A streamlined digital ecosystem designed to optimize healthcare delivery and improve patient outcomes.
features_page.symptomBenefit: Enables early detection of deterioration through continuous patient data.
features_page.roleBenefit: Streamlines triage and reduces hospital overcrowding.
features_page.notificationBenefit: Triggers immediate medical responses to critical symptoms.
features_page.dashboardBenefit: Supports safe home monitoring with trend identification.
features_page.communicationBenefit: Enables seamless information exchange for proactive care.

contact.title: Contact & Support
contact.description: We are here to support your journey towards better continuous care.
contact.messageDescription: Have questions about I-CAMS? Our team responds within 24 hours.
